name: monoceros-e2e-fixture
description: Test fixtures for the Monoceros workbench — cloned into dev-containers via `monoceros init --with-repo` to exercise repo-clone, Traefik port routing, per-service connectivity (postgres, pgvector, mongodb, rustfs/S3, mailpit, keycloak), and end-to-end flows. Each service probe asserts its injected connection env (ADR 0021), so an empty/missing connection env fails the e2e. The keycloak fixture also ships a realm export (keycloak/e2e-realm.json) mounted for import (ADR 0025).
author: Thorsten Kamann
